titleStmt.title: SII 20.55: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 55. (B.K. No. 12 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the backyard of the Taluk office.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 6, Dundubhi, Vaiśākha, śu. 5, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1082, April 6. The weekday, however, was Wednesday.

The inscription registers a gift of land made by the Five-Hundred members headed by Śānti-seṭṭi of Purigere, after purchasing it from the Brāhmaṇas with the money which had accumulated with interest, granted, formerly to Taḻara Nāgavarman, a subordinate of Vāvaṇa-nṛipati, to Lakkaṇa-seṭṭi, father of Śānti-seṭṭi, for the benefit of drawing water by picotta (ēta) from the well called Rāṭaṇada-bāvi when Trailōkyamalla Vīra-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permanaḍi-Jayasiṁhadēva was governing Purigeṟe-300, Beḷvola-300, Banavase-12000 and Kandūr-1000. It refers to one Jayakēsi of Sagara family as the subordinate of Jayasiṁha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi candracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē ©
sthirasiṁhāsanamādudu dhareyoḷcāḷukyavaṁśamā tailapaniṁ paredudu kuḷādṛvaregaṁ
harimūrttiya kīrtti rājavidyādharanaṁ © dhareyoḷtailapanindavātana sutaṁ satyā
śrayaṁ tatsahōdara putraṁ vibhu vikramāṁkananujaṁ tānayyaṇaṁgiṁntu sōdaramintī ja
yasiṁhanātana sutaṁ traiḷōkyamallaṁge sūniradādaṁ bhuvanaykanātananujaṁ permāḍibhūThe intended reading may besūnivanādaṁ or sūnivarādar.
vallabhaṁ © śrīmatribhuvanamallaṁ sāmajaripuvikramaṁ parākramatuṁgaṁ sāmānyamallane
ḷeyoḷ sōmēśvarananujanadaṭarāyajhaḷappaṁ © svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīva
llabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭṭārakasatyāśrayakuḷatiḷakacāḷukyābha
raṇa śrīmatṛbhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamā
candrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire tatpāda padmōpajīvi © Eṟagadidi neṟagisugu
khaḻgadhāreyiṁ dhāriṇiganteṟaguvaranaṇṇanaṁghriyoḷeṟagisuguṁ sauryyaśāḷivīra
noḷaṁbaṁ © svasti samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamāna lōkavikhyāta pallavānvaya śrīma
hīvallabha yuvarāja rājaparamēśvara vīramahēśvara vikramābharaṇa jayalakṣmīrama
ṇa . śaraṇāgatarakṣāmaṇi cāḷukyacūḍāmaṇi kadanatriṇētra . kṣatriyapavitra .
mattagajāṁgarāja . sahajamanōjaripurāya kaṭakasūṟekāra . naṇṇanaṁkakāṟa śrī
mattraiḷōkyamallavīranoḷambapallavapermmānaḍi jayasiṁhadēvarppurigeṟe mūnū
ṟuṁ beḷvalamūnūṟuṁ banavase pannircchāsiramuṁ kandūrsāsiramumoḷagāgi palavuṁ bhata
grāmaṁgaḷanāḻdu sukhaṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttumire tatpādapadmōpajīvi © purikarapuravaraparamē
śvaranujvaḷakīrtti sagaramārttaṇḍaṁ kēsarikētu rāṣṭrakūṭakavaranā tṛśatake negaḻda jaya kēsi
nripaṁ © svasti śrīharinirmmitā prathamakalpē viṣṇupallī tathā kal�āṇāṁ tritayaṁ gatē yuga
catuṣkē saptaviṁśē punaḥ dvāpārāpagamē virāṭatanayēna śvētanāmnā kṛtā grāmāṇāṁ tri
śatairvvṛtāḻpurikara śrīrājadhānītyabhūḥ © śrīvadhuge vallabhaṁ vākśrīvadhunarttanavi
ḷāsabhavanaṁ kīrttiśrīvadhumanōbhiramaṇaṁ śrī vāvaṇanṛpati vairikuḷayamadaṇḍaṁ ©
Intenisi negaḻda nripatige santaṁ jayalakṣmiyaṁ bhujāsiyoḷirisalkintivaneneḻevanenisu
vanentuṁ śrītaḷaṟa nāgavarmmaṁ dhareyoḷ © harisutanannanoldu patipēḻdaḍāgaṁ piridīva
dānadiṁ harisutanannanānta ripusēneyanaḷkuṟetūḷdu valligaṁ harisutanannanabjadaḷanē
treyaraṁ vaśadāgi māḍaluṁ harisutanannanendu pogaḻdappudu dhāriṇi nāgavarmmanaṁ © ©
Enisida nāgavarmmavibhu dharmma nimittade gōlegendu sajjanajanakarṇṇapūranenisiḻda nega
ḻteya seṭṭi lakkaṇayyanena yippudinnivake baḍḍiyoḷētamanendu pattu gaddina posavonnani
ttanuditōditamāge negaḻte dhātriyoḷ © Arighaṭemallana bīḍaṁ parirakṣipa taḷaṟa nāga
varmmaṁ dayeyiṁ purikaranagarada Aynūrbbare naḍayisuvantu māḍi dharmmētamumaṁ © tande na
ḍayisida baḷikantinduvara baḍḍigoṭṭu peḻcisi ponnaṁ mandaragiridhairyyaṁ sānandade śrīsāntiseṭṭi pari
rakṣisidaṁ © lakkaṇana sutaṁ sāntanoḷakkuṁ dore cārudatta balisibi guttaṁ mikka naranātanārppi
gakkume doreyāgalī dharāmaṇḍaḷadoḷ © palakālaṁ naḍedattu baḍḍiyoḷe dharmmētaṁ
baḷikantu pompalavāgalkalikālamēruvibudhaṁ saujanyaratnākaraṁ balavantaṁ prabhu śāntise
ṭṭiyoḷagāgaynūrbbaruṁ poṁgaḷaṁ palavaṁ koṭṭu vinūtarintu paḍedar śrīvipraroḷbhū
miyaṁ © jinanāthaṁ tanagāptaniṣṭagurudaśśrīyindraṇandibratīśananindyaṁ kaliviṭṭaseṭṭi janakaṁ
sōvabbe tāyvi vārijānane tānī keḷeyabbe bhāryyeyene kētaṁ dhanyanī dhātri yoḷmanumārggaṁ su
janaykamitrananaghaṁ samyaktvaratnākaraṁ © sujanajanavanajadinakara sujanamanaḻpadminī sarōvara
hamsaṁ sujanajanacittaniḷeyaṁ sujanaṁ kaliviṭṭagētanurbbītaḷadoḷ © svasti śrī cāḷukyavikramakāḷa
da 6 neya duṁdubhi saṁvatsarada vaiśākha su 5 brihaspativāradaṁdu śrī rājadhāni paṭṭaṇaṁ purigeṟe
ya śāntiseṭṭiyuṁ kartteya bammiseṭṭiyuṁ mukhyamāgiraynūrbbaruṁ rāṭaṇada bāviya dharmmē
takke śōbhanageṟeyiṁ mūḍa gāvuṇḍasvāmi cāvuṇḍamayyana mānyada keyyaṁ koṇḍu biṭṭa Ere ma
ttareraḍuvaidyara nākimayyana kayyalu Avara gāvuṇḍasvāmi mānyadalkoṇḍa mattarondu karmmavinnū
ṟa mūvattu matta © janakaṁ kaliviṭagētaṁ jananiye keḷeyabbe sōdaraṁ sāntaṇṇaṁ jinanāptaṁ tanagenisida vinu
ta śrī nēmanantu dhanyarumoḷarē © Intenisi negaḻda nēmināthaṁ tamma muttayya kaliviṭaseṭṭige parōkṣavine
yamāge Ā dharmmētakke vaidyara nākimayyana gāvuṇḍasvāmi mānyada keyyoḷage koṇḍu biṭṭa matta
rondu kammavaynūṟirppattu Antella mūvattāṟugēṇuṁ bārcciviḍiya gaḷeyoḷaḷedu koṇḍiṟisilgā
vina keyamattar 4 kamma 770 kkaṁ mēre mū cile reḍaka ya kallu Āgnēyada gōṁṭinalgāvu
ṇḍasvāmi kāvaṇnana keyya mēreyalnaṭṭa ki gallu Alliṁ paḍuvala vara keyya mēreyalnaṭṭa kinnari
gallu . matta teṁkamukha Āgnēyada gōṁṭinallaḍigayya seṭṭiya polada mēreya kāvaṇṇana keyya mēre
yalnaṭṭa kinnarigallu . nairityada gōṁṭina yya seṭṭiya polada sōbhanēśvarada keyya mēreyalna
ṭṭa kinnarigallu . vāyavyada gōṁṭinal sōbhanēśvarada gāvuṇḍa vasadiyakeyya mēreya lu da
Īśānyada gōṁṭinal gā The continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 20.55 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
